hero.title: Corporate Catering
hero.subtitle: From team trainings to board meetings, we make corporate events deliciously memorable. Let us handle the food while you focus on business.

services.subheadline: Whatever your corporate catering needs, we've got you covered with professional service and amazing food.

items.title: Team Training Events
items.description: Keep your team energized and focused during training sessions with our perfectly timed meal service.

items.title: Board Meetings
items.description: Impress stakeholders with premium catering that reflects your company's commitment to excellence.

items.title: Team Appreciation
items.description: Show your team they're valued with special catering for recognition events and milestones.

items.title: Breakfast Meetings
items.description: Start the day right with our famous breakfast boards and coffee service. More espresso, less depresso!

items.title: Working Lunches
items.description: Productive meetings deserve great food. Our boxed lunches and buffets keep things moving.

items.title: Client Events
items.description: Make lasting impressions on your clients with catering that shows you care about every detail.

popUps.heading: Surprise & Delight Pop-Ups
popUps.description: Want to create unexpected joy in your workplace? Our pop-up events bring delicious food and memorable moments to any location.

popUpTypes.title: Holiday Pop-Ups
popUpTypes.description: Special seasonal experiences around major holidays. Think Valentine's treats, Halloween spooky snacks, and festive holiday spreads.

popUpTypes.title: Office Building Events
popUpTypes.description: Bring excitement to your building lobby or common areas with a surprise pop-up catering experience.

popUpTypes.title: Retreats & Trainings
popUpTypes.description: Keep your team energized during off-site retreats and all-day training sessions with perfectly timed meals.

popUpTypes.title: Community Events
popUpTypes.description: We love being part of local Denver events, festivals, and community gatherings. Great food brings people together!

whyPopUpsWork.description: There's something special about unexpected food experiences. Pop-up events create excitement, build community, and give people something to talk about.

benefits.title: Unique Experience
benefits.description: Pop-ups create buzz and excitement that regular catering can't match.

benefits.title: Community Connection
benefits.description: Perfect for building relationships with employees, neighbors, or customers.

benefits.title: Memorable Moments
benefits.description: Unexpected food experiences create lasting memories and talking points.

whyChooseUs.intro: We're not just caterers — we're your partners in making every corporate event a success. We handle the heavy lifting so you can focus on what matters most.
bullets: Always on time or ahead of schedule — you'll never stress about timing
We do what we say, when we say — integrity you can count on
Fun, positive energy that elevates every corporate event
We work with your needs and budget — not the other way around
Excellence from first call to final cleanup
Creative menus for any theme — the sky's the limit!

finalCta.subheadline: Let's chat about your upcoming event. We'll create a custom menu that fits your budget, timeline, and taste preferences.
